title: papaver hispidum
intro: Papaver hispidum, also known as the hairy poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The hairy poppy has been used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, anxiety, and pain relief, and has also been used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Papaver hispidum is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
